task: Write a ring buffer allocator that manages a fixed-size byte array with alloc and free operations
Write a bit-vector struct that supports set, clear, get, and count operations on individual bits

tests.input: v bv = BitVec.new(64); bv.set(10); bv.clear(10); bv.get(10)

task: Write a simple arena allocator that allocates objects from a contiguous byte slab
Write a byte buffer with read and write cursors for network packet assembly
Write a file-like reader effect and a function that reads a file into a string
Write an LRU cache with get and put operations using a HashMap and a doubly-linked list concept

tests.input: v c = LruCache.new(2); c.put("a", 1); c.put("b", 2); c.put("c", 3); c.get("a")
v c = LruCache.new(2); c.put("a", 1); c.put("b", 2); c.get("a"); c.put("c", 3); c.get("a")

task: Write a process environment wrapper that provides typed access to environment variables
Write a command-line argument parser that extracts flags and key-value pairs from args
Write a hash function (FNV-1a) that computes a u64 hash from a byte slice
Write a simple logging framework with log levels and a configurable output sink
